title: helichrysum melaleucum
intro: Helichrysum melaleucum, also known as Yellow Everlasting, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce pain. The health benefits of Helichrysum melaleucum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Helichrysum melaleucum can be prepared into herbal teas, oils, and tinctures, which are often used to support physical and emotional well-being.
